params.name: The Milkmaid
params.description:
On Nov 7, 1660 AD, Vermeer completed the painting of the Milkmaid.
The Milkmaid is a painting by the famous Dutch painter, Vermeer. The woman in the picture is wearing a coarse yellow blouse, with a dark blue apron around her waist, and a white scarf on her head. Solemn and calm she pours milk from a jug. The soft light and reflections highlight Vermeer's technique. The seventeenth-century Dutchman depicts a scene of peace and tranquility.
